# Read the quranic_verses.json file
import json, re, sys, os, math
qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q), type(q)[:100] if isinstance(q, list) else None

# show keys of first entry and some samples
q[0]

# Define normalization functions

import unicodedata

tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]') # diacritics ranges
tatweel = re.compile(r'ـ')
punct = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]') # non-word, non-space, non-Arabic (but \w includes underscores/latin/digits)
# More robust: remove punctuation marks common
def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # remove tashkeel
    s = tashkeel.sub('', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = tatweel.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ؤ','و')
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', '', s)
    # collapse spaces and trim
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

query_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
query_snip = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"  # but snippet has ellipsis; we'll use cleaned version maybe substring 'وَعَدَدَ' 'الشكْرِ'
q_norm_full = normalize_ar(query_full)
q_norm_snip = normalize_ar(query_snip)
q_norm_full, q_norm_snip

# Create normalized ayah texts mapping for quick search
norm_texts = []
for entry in q:
    text = entry.get('ayah_text','')
    norm = normalize_ar(text)
    norm_texts.append((norm, text, entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id']))

# Search for substring matches where q_norm_full is substring of norm or vice versa
candidates = []
for norm, text, surah, ayah in norm_texts:

        candidates.append((surah, ayah, text, norm))
len(candidates)

hfile = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(hfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)
len(hadiths), hadiths[0].keys() if isinstance(hadiths, list) and hadiths else None

# Normalize hadiths and search for tokens 'شكر' and 'فعل' and 'وعدد' etc.
def search_hadiths_by_norm(query_norm, max_results=20):
    results = []
    for h in hadiths:
        text = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ''
        norm = normalize_ar(text)
        # quick filter by token presence
        if query_norm in norm or any(token in norm for token in query_norm.split()):
            # compute similarity metrics as above
            lcs_len = longest_common_substring_length(query_norm, norm)
            lcs_ratio = lcs_len / max(1, len(query_norm))
            tf1 = token_f1(query_norm, norm)
            score = max(lcs_ratio, tf1)
            results.append((score, lcs_ratio, tf1, h['hadithID'], text, norm))
    results_sorted = sorted(results, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return results_sorted[:max_results]

query_norm_full = q_norm_full
res_h = search_hadiths_by_norm(query_norm_full, max_results=20)
len(res_h), res_h[:10]

# find Surah 9 (التوبة) entries
